title: Evidence
description: A piece of tagged information extracted from the transcript.

statement.description: The evidence statement, written in neutral language.

classification.description: How this evidence was obtained or classified.

confidence.description: Confidence score 0.0 (speculative) to 1.0 (certain). Use 1.0 only for explicit_evidence.

source_turns.description: Turn IDs that support or produced this evidence.

related_entities.description: Entity IDs relevant to this evidence.

related_threads.description: Plot thread IDs relevant to this evidence.

notes.description: Optional notes on why this is classified as it is.
